nodes.name: Notion Webhook: New Want List Item

parameters.query: INSERT INTO librarian_want_list (notion_page_id, search_query, subject_category, priority, status, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.notion_page_id}}', '{{$json.search_query}}', '{{$json.subject_category}}', {{$json.priority}}, 'pending', datetime('now'))

fields.name: Status
fields.value: ⏳ Pending next acquisition cycle (2 AM UTC)

parameters.query: INSERT INTO librarian_acquisitions (acquisition_run_id, trigger_type, status, run_started_at) VALUES ('{{$json.notion_page_id}}', 'notion_event', 'pending', datetime('now'))
